headline: Prediction Market Volume Will Reach $1 Trillion By 2030: Bernstein
summary: Bernstein projects prediction market volumes will hit $240 billion in 2026 and reach $1 trillion by 2030. What it means for HOOD, COIN, DKNG, and FLUT.
